zh.lifeSummary: 當Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief於1497年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素時，他的父親Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean27歲，母親Marion MacLean of Treshnish32歲。他於1520年與Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1568年9月14日在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素享年71歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Hector
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name borne in classical legend by the Trojan champion who was killed by the Greek Achilles. His name (Greek Hektōr) is probably an agent derivative of Greek ekhein ‘to restrain’. It was never popular in England, but there are occasional examples from the Middle Ages. In Scotland it was used as a classicized form of the Gaelic personal name Eachann, which is composed of each ‘horse’ + donn ‘brown’. It has been moderately popular in the United States since the 1940s.

nameMeanings.name: Mor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

en.lifeSummary: When Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief was born in 1497, in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean, was 27 and his mother, Marion MacLean of Treshnish, was 32. He married Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart in 1520, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 14 September 1568, in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 71, and was buried in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief est né en 1497, à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Marion MacLean of Treshnish, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart en 1520, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1568, à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief 1497 in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean 27 und seine Mutter Marion MacLean of Treshnish 32. Er hat 1520 in Scotland Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 14. September 1568 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief è nato il nel 1497 nel Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Marion MacLean of Treshnish, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart nel 1520, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 14 settembre 1568, nel Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

Chief of Clan MacLeanは27歳，母Marion MacLean of Treshnishは32歳であった。1520年にスコットランドでLady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1568年9月14日にスコットランドアルグイルダアルト カストルで71歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルダアルト カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief(이)가 1497년 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Marion MacLean of Treshnish(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1520년 스컷랜드에서 Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1568년 9월 14일 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief родился в 1497 г. в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion MacLean of Treshnish, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart в 1520 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 14 сентября 1568 г. в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief nació en 1497, en Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Marion MacLean of Treshnish, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart en 1520, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1568, en Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.
